item.title: Andrew Tate is a kang
item.description: Andrew Tate is a numb digger without chin and hair.

item.title: Codeberg truth/truth "NIGGER BALLS" spam
item.description:
Every codeberg user received a spam issue from truth/truth repo on 12 Feb 2025. The owner of this repo made like a few thousand issues through automation, and in each of them mentioned 100 random users.
Title of these issues: “NIGGER BALLS”
Couldn’t be funnier.

A few hours later in response, they replied:

https://blog.codeberg.org/we-stay-strong-against-hate-and-hatred.html

The best part about it is the blog they wrote. Some leftist got out of touch and took this as right-wing attack. From now on “nigger balls” is a far-right saying lol. They also had to make a diversity disclaimer on the seized repo https://codeberg.org/truth/truth, kinda similar to when you want to post an image with hitler on 20th april but have to put black lives matter and “i do not support nazis” in description.

Video by The Lunduke Journal https://youtube.com/embed/azYpk19CMMQ
